description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:stable Docker image and define a single build stage with three jobs: clang++, clang++-latest libc++, and g++. The clang++ job (excluded for the gitlab-org project) runs apt-get update and installs clang, cmake, make, libboost-timer-dev, libboost-serialization-dev, libblas-dev, libfftw3-dev, liblapack-dev and pkg-config, then creates a build directory, prints clang++ --version, configures CMake with -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug and -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG=1, builds with "cmake --build . --parallel 2" falling back to "--parallel 1 --verbose" if needed, and finally runs "ctest -j 2 --output-on-failure". The clang++-latest libc++ job (also excluded for gitlab-org, marked interruptible and dependent on clang++) installs ca-certificates, clang, cmake, make, libboost-timer-dev, libboost-serialization-dev, libblas-dev, libc++-dev, libc++abi-dev, libfftw3-dev, liblapack-dev, pkg-config, tar and wget, then creates a build directory, prints clang++ --version, configures CMake with -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug, -stdlib=libc++, -DBOOST_NO_CXX98_FUNCTION_BASE, -D_LIBCPP_ENABLE_CXX17_REMOVED_AUTO_PTR, and -D_LIBCPP_HARDENING_MODE=_LIBCPP_HARDENING_MODE_DEBUG, builds with the same parallel fallback logic, and runs ctest as above. The g++ job (non‑interruptible) installs ca-certificates, cmake, g++, make, the same Boost, BLAS, LAPACK, FFTW and pkg-config packages, prints g++ --version, creates a build directory, configures CMake with -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug and -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG=1, builds with the same parallel fallback, and runs ctest. Set global variables CODECOV_TOKEN, GIT_DEPTH, GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY, NVIDIA_DISABLE_REQUIRE, RT_VERSION and SONAR_USER_HOME, and configure workflow rules to trigger on tags, the default branch, and merge‑request events with auto‑cancel interruptible on new commits.
